summary: Iteration 5 testing completed successfully. Backend refactoring verified - all 22 API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - all navigation links work, farm selector dropdown functional, Historical Reports page with 3 tabs working, Settings page with farm management/camera/ollama sections working.

issues: Soil Moisture shows unusual values (Min: 0%, Avg: 107%, Max: 1656%) - likely due to test data or data aggregation issue

action_items: Review sensor data aggregation in reports - showing unusual min/max values
critical_code_review_comments: Backend refactoring from 1200-line server.py to 12 route modules is clean and well-organized
Multi-farm support (2-5 farms) working correctly with CRUD operations
Historical reports endpoints return proper summaries with daily aggregation
Settings config allows updating camera URLs and Ollama config
seed_data_creation: None - existing test user and farms used
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working. Backend refactored into 12 route modules. Multi-farm support (max 5) with farm selector in header. Historical Reports page has 3 tabs (Sensor Data, Irrigation, Water Efficiency) with charts. Settings page has Profile, Farm Management, Camera Config, Ollama Config sections. Firebase push notifications are PLACEHOLDER only (not active). ML microservice (ml_server.py) exists but not started as separate service.

real_ml_models: Crop prediction uses real ML model (crop_model.pkl - RandomForest)
Irrigation prediction uses real ML model (irrigation_model.pkl - RandomForest)
Chatbot uses real Gemini AI (gemini-3-pro-preview via Emergent LLM Key)
